description: An analyst must use facial recognition on drone footage to confirm the identity of a high-value individual (HVI) at a meeting.

nodes.task_description: Scan the drone video feed for individuals matching the general description of the HVI.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst isolates several potential candidates from the video.

nodes.task_description: Extract high-quality still images of the candidates' faces from the video.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst successfully extracts clear facial images.

nodes.task_description: Run the extracted images through a facial recognition database.

expected_outcome.expected: The system returns a high-confidence match, positively identifying the HVI.
